# SRC066 - Longer or Shorter? Free Trial Strategy in SaaS/Freemium

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | SaaS Trials |
| Authors / source | Zhang et al. |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Field experiment / academic article |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12217587/](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12217587/) |

## Bias / limitation

Specific platform/context.

## Core takeaway

Trial length and exposure change conversion; test instead of assuming.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to make offers and trial lengths experiment variables.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
